original_image_tags: large circled number "16" stamped in black ink in the lower left corner.

elements.description: A typed military message form (WD AGO Form 11-168) containing no photographs, sketches, diagrams, or maps. The page consists entirely of typed text, form structure, and handwritten annotations. Visible text includes a report of an 'OBJECT RESEMBLING A GRAYYISH BALLOON' observed from Elmendorf Field, July 1947, and a handwritten note 'Received AFBIR-CO 14 July 47'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree that the page contains no photographs, sketches, diagrams, or maps, only typed text, form structure, and handwritten annotations.
